resources.string: 小额免密支付设置成功！
在设置-应用-小米商城-权限中开启读写手机存储权限,以正常使用相册功能
安装应用需要打开未知来源权限，请去设置中开启权限
相册权限未开启，请到手机设置页设置
您的帐户还未通过验证！
请填写 %1$s 部分的数字
"现正为您排队,请耐心等待 我们将尽快告知您排队结果"
验证码获取失败,请重新获取
已将验证码推送到您的手机上，请注意通知栏消息
没有预约，不能参与本轮购买
我已阅读并同意 《FaceID身份验证服务用户协议》
请先同意《FaceID身份验证服务用户协议》
小米商城是小米官网，提供一站式小米产品及服务购买功能，还有新人、会员等专属福利。更是小米新品首发、米粉交流阵地，卸载后将影响正常使用
你正在使用移动数据网络，确认继续更新？
当前网络为 Wi-Fi 环境，您可点击立即更新
此功能需要小米有品获取使用读取【麦克风】权限，用于音视频录制。
登录账号已过期，请重新登录
检测到您正在使用小米账号“%1$s”，是否使用此账号登录小米商城？
Face up the bank card and align the edge of the card
YPDBanner adapter did not initial error!
YPDBanner adapter can not be null!
"在使用过程中，本应用需要访问相机权限，用于扫码、拍摄图片以发表商品评论等功能。 如果您不同意调用以上权限，将导致该功能无法正常使用，但不影响您使用本应用的基本功能。您可随时前往“设置”>“权限管理”，选择关闭以上权限调用以撤回您的同意。"
Failed to communicate with the bundler to enabling debugging with Nuclide.
Disabling Fast Refresh because it requires a development bundle.
Switching to development bundle in order to enable Fast Refresh.
Failed to load bundle. Try restarting the bundler or reconnecting your device.
为保障支付安全,付款码将60s自动
数据加载异常，请稍后再试~
非内测用户暂不支持体验
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
网络连接失败，请检查您的网络
我已阅读并同意 《个人信用信息告知书》
Please use it after you agree to the terms

"Prior to utilizing any of our services, please thoroughly review and explicitly consent to both the《User Agreement》and《Privacy Policy》.These documents outline the terms and conditions governing your use of Airstar Finance, as well as our commitment to handling your personal information with the utmost care and discretion, in accordance with your preferences and applicable legal frameworks. We are sincerely grateful for the trust you have placed in us.
·For the stable operation of the app, an internet connection is mandatory on your device. This may entail the consumption of data or WLAN traffic, the cost of which will be subject to the prevailing tariffs set by your local network operator. We encourage you to consult their pricing details for accurate information.
·To guarantee an optimal Airstar Finance service experience, we kindly request permission to access certain features on your device. These include your phone, camera, microphone for recording, location services, external storage, contacts list, phone number, and media files (for capturing images, recording videos, and audio).
Should you find yourself unable to agree with the provisions outlined in these agreements and policies, you are still welcome to explore our products and services in a browsing capacity. This will enable you to acquaint yourself with the broad range of offerings available within Airstar Finance, while respecting any reservations you may have regarding the sharing of personal information."

"Prior to utilizing any of our services, please thoroughly review and explicitly consent to both the<txt color=\"#0097FF\" href=\"https://jr.mi.com/uc/s/app_setting/agreements/agreement_latest.html?app=%1$s&_external=true&from=%2$s\">《User Agreement》</txt>and<txt color=\"#0099ff\" href=\"https://jr.mi.com/uc/s/app_setting/agreements/privacy_latest.html?app=%1$s&_external=true&from=%2$s\">《Privacy Policy》</txt>.These documents outline the terms and conditions governing your use of Airstar Finance, as well as our commitment to handling your personal information with the utmost care and discretion, in accordance with your preferences and applicable legal frameworks. We are sincerely grateful for the trust you have placed in us.
·For the stable operation of the app, an internet connection is mandatory on your device. This may entail the consumption of data or WLAN traffic, the cost of which will be subject to the prevailing tariffs set by your local network operator. We encourage you to consult their pricing details for accurate information.
·To guarantee an optimal Airstar Finance service experience, we kindly request permission to access certain features on your device. These include your phone, camera, microphone for recording, location services, external storage, contacts list, phone number, and media files (for capturing images, recording videos, and audio).
Should you find yourself unable to agree with the provisions outlined in these agreements and policies, you are still welcome to explore our products and services in a browsing capacity. This will enable you to acquaint yourself with the broad range of offerings available within Airstar Finance, while respecting any reservations you may have regarding the sharing of personal information."
检测到为3g／4g环境，是否继续播放
您需同意相关协议方可使用本软件
*Please go to the Digital RMB APP to bind or unbind bank cards
"Your account info has changed. Please log in again."
Account login error, please log in again.
"Certificate date error. Please check your local date and try again."
Server error. Please try again later
无法下载更新包,请检查SD卡是否可用
新安装包下载已暂停,点击继续
小米商城下载完成,点击安装
在设置-应用-小米商城-权限中开启读写手机存储,以正常使用下载更新App功能.
"您的帐户安全邮箱是: %1$s 用于登录小米帐户及找回密码"
被屏蔽所有操作，可能由于签名不正确或无权限
支付请求发送成功，商户订单是否成功支付应该以商户后台收到支付结果
订单处理中，支付结果未知(有可能已经支付成功)，请通过后台接口查询订单状态
支付宝服务异常，建议您选择其他支付方式
翼支付服务异常，建议您选择其他支付方式
MiPay服务异常，建议您选择其他支付方式
This device does not provide a decoder for %1$s
This device does not provide a secure decoder for %1$s
Please check your network settings and click refresh
与服务器连接有误，请尝试修改系统时间到当前时间
抱歉，该视频不适合在此设备上播放。
无法播放此视频,请检测网络是否可用
银联服务异常，建议您选择其他支付方式
小米商城在使用中需要连接网络和获取位置信息，是否同意？
再按一次退出小米商城
为保证服务正常使用，请先完成人脸验证
请正对屏幕，勿遮挡面部
"发现新版本，必须更新后方可使用！ "
请访问 account.xiaomi.com 找回密码
已为您开启%1$d元额度小额免密，可在右上角设置
在提供服务的过程中，我们可能需要调用您的以下设备权限，由于系统权限接口的原因，我们无法在权限调用前进行申请缘由说明。您可以在权限申请时同意或者拒绝，也可以在手机系统“设置”里管理相关权限：
更多权限信息说明，请点击<txt color=\"#0099ff\" href=\"https://jr.mi.com/uc/s/app_setting/agreements/privacy_latest.html?app=%1$s\">《隐私政策》</txt>查看。
用于实名过程中的人脸识别服务
获取位置信息，用于完成扫脸环境检测、或信贷服务安全检测、反欺诈目的
用于实名过程中的人脸识别服务
This function is not available, if you need to use it, please turn off the incognito mode.
答: 您可以继续使用原账号
答: 您可以申请授权实名中心清除此账号的实名信息
2. 您忘记此账号和密码且不再使用
Some features in %1$s may not work properly without HMS Core, which is not installed on your device.
%1$s is unable to use HMS Core. Launch Optimizer (Phone Manager) or go to Settings, enable all permissions for %2$s (including auto-launch and secondary launch), and try again.
It appears that you have an unofficial version of HMS Core (%1$s) installed on your device. Please uninstall HMS Core from Settings and return to this app to install the official version.
全民付支付插件交易明细
全民付支付插件可信设备
当前网络不可用，请检查网络设置
保证照片清晰、边缘完整、避免反光
超过扫描时间，识别失败

您确定要删除这张图片？

请您阅读并同意<txt color=\"#0097FF\" href=\"https://jr.mi.com/uc/s/app_setting/agreements/agreement_latest.html?app=com.xiaomi.loan&_external=true&from=%2$s\">《用户协议》</txt>与<txt color=\"#0099ff\" href=\"https://jr.mi.com/uc/s/app_setting/agreements/privacy_latest.html?app=com.xiaomi.loan&_external=true&from=%2$s\">《隐私政策》</txt>。

尊敬的用户您好，欢迎您使用小米贷款，您可使用本应用以获取相应的信贷服务、消费分期服务。为向您提供基本服务，本应用需要根据您选择的服务相应收集、使用您的个人信息，具体请参见《隐私政策》。如果您不同意我们收集并使用以上信息，将导致本应用无法正常运行，您可选择“取消”退出本应用以终止服务。在您逐步使用本应用过程中，您将根据不同业务场景开启相应的设备权限如相机权限以实现该功能。我们将严格遵守相关法律法规和隐私政策以保护您的个人信息。
"当前已登录账号与环境配置不一致，将直接退出。 请明确账号环境配置，或者清除数据后重新登录。"
暂时未查到您的收集内容
内部配置错误，无法解析端口
Please install WeChat and open it in the WeChat applet.
您的手机未连接到数据服务。要立即查看此信息，请通过连接到互联网的任意计算机访问 %s。
商品太抢手，请尝试重新购买
请将正脸置于取景框内
请向左或向右缓慢转头
光线过亮，请到更暗的环境中验证
请您拿起手机，保持手机垂直
使用全民付移动支付需要您开启定位功能,请至系统设置中开启
请开启APP定位权限并保证网络处于畅通状态
获取位置信息失败,是否重新获取?
查看购物车前，请先登录
请在“我的/小米会员”开通会员后参与

密码长度8－16位，数字、字母、符号至少包含两种

string.Data: Currently logged in as a minor account. Due to the protection of minors, %1s is temporarily unavailable.

亲，您的设备不支持电话功能

There is a missing edge on the card

Please place the side with profile photo
There is light reflection. Please adjust
Please wait for the verification result
Please keep the content in the frame

Create a Xiaomi Account via your phone number %s now?
Name must be longer than %d characters
This nickname is invalid. Try a different one.
This photo is invalid. Try a different one.
This email address is already associated with another Xiaomi Account.
The email address you entered is invalid.
The text you entered is too long
"You haven't set the password yet. Sign in with SMS."
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Try again later.
The username you entered is invalid
This phone number is already associated with another Xiaomi Account.
Too many attempts. Wait a minute or two and try again.
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
"We'll use this email to verify your account"
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
Check the URL and try again, or copy the URL and open it in your browser.
"Couldn't connect to the network. Try again."
Too many accounts have been associated with this number. Try a different one.
You need to sign in again

"We shall protect your personal information in accordance with the relevant laws and regulations. This app needs the following permissions to work normally:

Using camera (for setting your profile photo)

If you don't agree to grant such permissions, you won't be able to use some features of this app; however, its basic functionality will still be available to you. You can always restrict permissions or revoke your authorization in the Settings."
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
A system error occurred. Go back and try again.
This app needs to access selected Gallery items to be able to set your profile photo. Allow now?
"You've requested too many verification emails. Make sure that the verification email isn't in your inbox's Spam folder."
"Can't be the same as current password"
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
Add your phone number to protect your account.
Session expired. Sign in again to reconnect this account.
Too many attempts. Try other ways to sign in.
System is busy. Wait a minute or two and try again.
"The service isn't available. Make sure the app is installed and not blocked."
Check your network settings and try again

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy and Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

string.name: passport_user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Xiaomi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

The code you entered is incorrect
The code you entered is incorrect

"交易状态暂无法获取 请以POS上显示为准"
超过订单支付时效后，订单将被取消哦
超期未支付，订单已取消
应还款金额%s元(以银行账单为准)
"暂无有效支付方式 请尝试激活微信支付、支付宝、小米钱包后重试"
如果您对该笔交易有任何质疑

"支付完成
请确认POS显示的交易结果。"
用于获取手机的账户列表以便快捷登录。
当您订阅活动及业务提醒服务时，您需要开启日历权限，以确保我们可以修改日历中的日程信息，为您设置提醒。
当您使用扫一扫、头像设置、用户反馈、图像识别等服务时，您可以通过开启相机权限以便进行实时拍摄并上传图片或视频；在需要人脸识别的场景下，则需要调用您的摄像头进行人脸的拍摄。
我们需要获取您的相机权限，用于金融和保险作业，拍摄所需证件和文件。
您使用限定销售区域的产品及服务或向您展示该地区的专属产品及服务时，您可以通过开启位置权限以便查看或获取当前所在区域的服务；我们产品内使用的某些第三方功能组件如蚂蚁扫脸，可能会申请位置信息，用于完成扫脸环境检测、或信贷服务安全检测、反欺诈目的;
为了提供打卡等服务，我们需要获取您的定位权限。
当您申请汽车金融服务时，可能会获取您的位置信息，用于完成安全检测、反欺诈目的。当您使用车险在线报案服务，需要您开启位置权限，方便我们为您向保险机构申请理赔。
当您使用智能客服语音输入时使用，您可以开启麦克风权限点击语音按键进行录音，以便您进行快速便捷输入；当您办理开户业务时使用，根据监管规定需要您开启麦克风权限进行录音以便进行身份认证及视频见证流程。
当您开启%1$sAPP时，我们会向您申请获取此权限，目的是正常识别您的设备识别信息、设备状态信息以及设备环境信息，以便完成安全风控、进行用户统计和服务推送。
当您使用扫一扫、头像设置、用户反馈、图像识别、将文件下载至本地或打开本地文件时，您可以通过开启存储权限使用或保存图片、视频或文件。
用于金融和保险作业,上传或下载所需的证件和文件等资料。
安装应用需要打开未知来源权限，请去设置中开启权限
当您进入首页，本应用需要访问定位权限，用于为您识别商品库存、判断配送范围、首页个性化商品推荐等功能。如果您不同意调用以上权限，将导致该功能无法正常使用，但不影响您使用本应用的基本功能。您可随时前往“设置”>“权限管理”，选择关闭以上权限调用以撤回您的同意
This service requires you to have the following permissions, and we will strictly abide by relevant laws to protect your personal information:
如果您不同意调用以上权限，将导致该功能无法正常使用，但不影响您使用本应用的基本功能。您可在系统权限设置中选择关闭以上权限调用以撤回您的同意。
在设置-应用-小米商城-权限中开启%1$s权限，以正常使用%2$s功能
页面打开失败,我们正在努力修复
请输入壹钱包支付密码:
银行卡号不正确，请重新输入
为保障账户资金安全，只能绑定认证用户本人银行卡
请输入持卡人本人的银行卡号
请先开通银联在线支付业务
请输入银行卡预留的手机号码
请输入您的身份证号码
身份证号码不正确，请重新输入
请输入六位数字确认密码
信用卡CVN2长度不是3位，请重新输入
为保障安全，是否禁止其他设备使用全民付移动支付？
请将付款码告知收银员输入收银终端
告知收银员输入收银终端
请将手机靠近收银终端完成付款
中信银行行用卡 尾号2301
壹钱包密码键盘无密文信息返回
已安装壹钱包应用签名信息不符，请确认是否安装正确应用程序
首次使用本设备必须联网
忘记全民付移动支付密码
短信发送失败，请重新获取短信验证码！
短信发送成功，请输入短信验证码！
无可使用的银行卡，请确定退出支付插件或添加银行卡？
若您未在银行预留手机号，请联系银行客服。银行联系电话：95599
"请在电脑浏览器上登录银联持卡人服务网站开通银联在线支付业务。 网址为"
请到柜面或通过网银开通银联在线支付业务
银行卡信息填写不正确
请输入6位全民付移动支付密码
全民付移动支付身份验证
"为保障交易安全，请输入 支付密码更新本地密钥"
超过免密额度时，需要验证支付密码，并且系统会移除可疑交易。
元，无需在POS上输入支付密码。（仅限使用NFC做全民付移动支付）
请输入6位数字确认密码
请输入六位新的数字密码
请输入6位数字重置密码
请输入六位原始数字密码
请输入6位数字原始密码
网络状态异常，请检查网络
未连接到互联网，请打开网络连接
暂时没有支持的银行卡列表
银行卡未开通银联无卡功能
对不起，暂不支持此卡的绑定和支付。
请勾选《用户协议》后再进行下一步
"支付超时 为保障支付安全，请重新支付"
输入的支付密码有误，请重新输入
如还有不明白的地方，请拨打银联商务客服电话：95534
如果之前未使用过此支付插件进行绑卡支付，将进入到首次绑卡流程，请按照提示填写信息进行绑卡，流程只需要3–4步，请耐心完成，谢谢
可以点击全民付移动支付弹框中的“银联卡信息”(如：工商银行信用卡(****))，进入到选择付款方式页面进行选择。
先要进入到“选择付款方式”页面，点击“设置”，进入设置页面。
如果金额显示，只有一个金额的话，代表无优惠；如果金额显示两条，其中一条在右侧，且被划掉，代表右侧为原金额，左侧为实付金额。
首先需要进入选择付款方式页面，在最后一行会看到“添加银行卡”选项，选择此项后按照所需信息填写，完成新卡绑定。
需要进入设置页面，点击“忘记密码”后，按照提示填写所需信息完成密码重置。
先进入设置页面，点击“修改支付密码”，进入修改页面。
1、首次使用全民付移动支付远程快捷
2、如何切换付款方式？如何进入“选择付款方式”页面？
为了保障您的资金安全，请输入全民付移动支付密码直接登录，若忘记全民付移动支付密码，请点击忘记全民付移动支付密码。
您是全民付用户，请输入支付密码直接登录，若忘记支付密码，请点击新注册或忘记支付密码。
为了保障您的资金安全，请输入壹钱包支付密码直接登录，若忘记壹钱包支付密码，请返回壹钱包中设置。
请在全民付中进行身份证验证
为了保障您的支付安全，请先完成实名操作
数据异常，持卡人姓名信息缺失
是否在本机记录支付账户信息用于NFC支付？
由于您长时间未操作，请重新登录
输入六位数字支付密码
正在为您自动填写短信验证码
请把手机靠近收银终端完成付款！
在线获取最新绑卡列表
请同意勾选相应隐私政策
为了您的支付安全，请先输入当前小米账号的密码
订单信息错误，请返回商户重新下单
可于＂我的－我的钱包－优惠券＂中查看
万万没想到，小米手机新用户还能在 @小米商城 领取专享红包！限量米粒、购买资格、优惠券随机发放， 小伙伴们还不快来围观！说不定下一个惊喜，就是为你准备的！不说了，我要去拆红包了！[小米商城(下载)%1$s]
已发送一条带验证码的短信至 %s
"您的小米帐户密保手机是 %1$s 用于登录和找回密码"
激活账号会发送一条普通短信，资费由运营商收取
已经登记成功，我们会第一时间通知您前来购买
小米帐户还未激活，确认要退出？

string.name: risk_block_title
string.Data: 交易被关闭，详情请致电<font color=#0000ff>95534</font>

resources.string: Place the front camera on top
"APP异常退出给您造成不便，请见谅～ 您可以通过如下操作继续访问小米商城"
已检测为安全环境，个人信息安全保障中
将二维码放入框内，即可自动扫描
售后条款;售后规则;售后须知;售后政策
客服电话;在线客服;小米客服电话;小米客服;售后电话;人工服务
上门安装;装电视;电视安装
查看物流;小米物流;几天到货;物流进度
小米之家地址;小米实体店;小米展示厅;体验产品;专卖店
售后维修点;售后网点;售后服务点;退换修;碎屏
本地密钥已过期，请用户联网进行更新
本地密钥已过期，请用户联网更新
支付金额超出单笔交易限额，请重新选择正确金额进行支付！
请选择您需要的支付方式！
新的安装包正在下载中,点击暂停
系统维护中，请稍后再试
小米商城APP 查看更多详情
网络连接超时，请稍后重试
温馨提示：请避免设置与常用银行卡取款密码相同或相似的密码，也勿使用简单密码或用生日、手机号、证件号等个人信息做密码，以免给您的资金带来安全隐患。
图片下载中，请稍后再试
投稿小米徕卡影像大赛
"%s falsify area, Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time, It does not show anything."
The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file?
Please switch to mobile data network and try again
Please set the system time to automatic acquisition mode and try again
预览尺寸与屏幕分辨率不匹配
此功能需要小米有品获取使用读取【存储卡】和【摄像头】权限，用于查看相册图片，发表图片评论，二维码扫码，相册拍照等。
此功能需要小米有品获取使用读取【存储卡】权限，用于查看相册图片。
此功能需要小米有品获取使用【摄像头】权限，用于二维码扫码，相册拍照。
请您阅读并同意<txt color=\"#337DFF\" href=\"https://jr.mi.com/uc/s/app_setting/agreements/privacy_latest.html?app=com.xiaomi.jr&_external=true&from=%1$s\">《天星金融隐私政策》</txt>
取消支付密码验证将导致本次支付不成功，请确认是否要退出支付密码验证
想要不打开APP即可进行NFC支付？下载NFC支持
没有更多优惠券了|查看历史优惠券
为了您的账号安全请输入支付密码
已为您开启200元额度小额免密，可在右上角设置
手机号码如在%1$s帐户里有多个，需把该联系号码设置为默认手机，建议用户至柜面修改。
为了您的账号安全请输入支付密码
请先安装支付宝客户端
将手机靠近POS机感应区即可进行NFC支付
NFC支付不用打开app就可以哦~
付款码仅用于向收银员展示以进行付款，请不要发给其他人
通讯异常，请检查手机网络设置
请打开商户APP名称APP，在银联全民付快捷支付中至少绑定一张银行卡，方可使用现场移动支付功能POS：用户手机未绑定任何银行卡或扣款账户，无法使用现场移动支付功能
用户手机未绑定任何银行卡或扣款账户,无法使用现场移动支付功能
交易通讯未完成，请将手机贴近POS机
小米钱包服务异常，建议您选择其他支付方式
微信支付服务异常，建议您选择其他支付方式
网络状况不佳，分享失败，请稍后再试
请先安装新浪微博客户端
您还没有安装微信客户端，请安装后再来分享...
您的微信客户端版本过低，请升级后再来分享...
交易密码错误，请重新输入
您需阅读并同意相关政策条款方可使用本软件
An exception occurred when selecting a picture
Please avoid occlusion, blurring and reflection.
Succeeded to record. Please turn over to the back of your ID card.
" Portrait side captured, please <font color=red>flip</font> to the emblem side of the document "
Please align ID card with the frame before pressing the shutter.
You are aware of and agree to it
·Collect and use your own identification information
·This operation data is only for user identification verification, safe and reliable
You are aware of and agree to the application provider
Unable to recognize. Switch the mode to take a photo and upload it?
I have read and agree to the agreement
Place the card with no obstructions

data error, please try again later
data error, please try again later
data error, please try again later
data error, please try again later

please use the original id card for verification

You have denied or disabled permission. Please grant it manually

" <font color=#000000>Thank you for using this product. We want to provide you with some important information about how we utilize the data you provide to train and improve our AI model. We use the data you provide to train and improve our AI model, which allows us to deliver more accurate results to you. By continuing to use this product, you consent to our use of the data you such purposes. If you have any concerns about the data you have shared or require further information, please refer to our</font> <font color=#006EFF> privacy policy </font><font color=#000000>for more details.</font>"
This permission is used to capture the card for card OCR
无法下载更新包，请检查SD卡是否可用
请合上手机使用前置摄像头

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Store's User Agreement and Privacy Policy and Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Store's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_with_telecom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Store's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_with_unicom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Store's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Unicom verification services."

resources.string: "登录帐户即表示您同意遵守 小米帐户的"
注册帐户即表示您同意遵守小米帐户的

string.name: user_agreement_protocal_dialog_hint_default
string.Data: "Read and agreed to Mi Store's User Agreement and Privacy Policy and Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

resources.string: 请合上屏幕使用此功能
请切到全屏模式使用此功能
你好，欢迎来到小米商城
请输入小米安全令牌生成的验证码
"身份证已过期，请使用新身份证进行实名认 证。如有问题，联系客服咨询。"
身份审核失败，请使用您本人身份证重新上传
您的证件已绑定其他小米账号
"身份审核失败，请使用您本人身份证重新上 传。注意光线，避免身份证反光。"
资料仅用于小米实名认证
请将身份证摆到提示框内
用于扫证过程中的身份证检测服务
用于扫证过程中从相册选择身份证服务
未检测到清晰人脸;请保持正脸清晰且勿晃动
"您可尝试在应用权限管理中 打开摄像头权限"
Layout changes, click to refresh the page
点击登录小米商城以启用此功能
登录后可查看米金动态
Connect Download Manager failed, please check the Download Manager state in the Application Management.
Storage unavailable, please check the SD card.
